calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Arkady Itkin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Vernon Moorer.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VMA Security Group, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Vernon Moorer sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

General Damages: $40,000.00
Special Damages (Medical) $9,744.20
Costs: $483.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $50,228.10
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To May-01-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Continued To Feb-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
